title: docs: regenerate APIDOCS.md
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Auto-generated from OpenAPI spec changes after a successful production deploy.

gist.headline: The map got fresh ink
gist.blurb: The API reference has been re-synced with the production OpenAPI spec. Fewer stale signposts in the garden.
gist.summary: Regenerated APIDOCS.md from the production OpenAPI specification so the published API reference matches the deployed service.
gist.impact: Developers reading APIDOCS.md now get documentation aligned with the current production API.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy garden map desk represents the refreshed API reference: Polli, wearing tiny librarian glasses, compares a glowing retro terminal's OpenAPI scroll with a freshly inked field guide. Small code-plants and flowers surround the desk, signaling that the documentation stays in step with the living platform.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polli, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink blush, light blue wings, and tiny librarian glasses, updating a large API field guide from a glowing retro terminal scroll in a flower-filled garden; lime green (#ecf874) shines prominently from the screen and code-plants. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, with subtle pixel-font text: 'API DOCS'.
